nasb.text: In the third month after the sons of Israel had gone out of the land of Egypt, on that very day they came into the wilderness of Sinai.

esv.text: On the third new moon after the people of Israel had gone out of the land of Egypt, on that day they came into the wilderness of Sinai.

cnv.text: 以色列人從埃及地出來以後，滿了三個月的那一天，就來到西奈的曠野。

ccb.text: 以色列人离开埃及满三个月的那一天，他们来到西奈半岛的旷野。
